name: omini-runner
description: Production package for the Omini Node runner and schema validation.

scripts.test:js-runtime: node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/fusion/fusion-brain.test.js && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/runtime/package_queryengine.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/runtime/queryengineRuntimeMode.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/runtime/queryengine.smoke.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/runtime/queryengineRunner.integration.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/runtime/adapter-first-runner.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/specialists/dependencyImpact.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/specialists/testSelection.test.mjs && node scripts/js-runtime-launcher.mjs tests/e2e/specialistHardening.test.mjs && npm run test:e2e:chat-contract
scripts.test:python:pytest: python -m pytest -q tests/contracts tests/integration tests/runtime/control tests/runtime/language tests/runtime/observability tests/runtime/test_orchestrator_decomposition.py --cov=backend/python/brain/runtime/language --cov=backend/python/brain/runtime/control --cov=backend/python/brain/runtime/observability --cov=backend/python/brain/runtime/orchestrator_services --cov-config=.coveragerc --cov-report=term-missing
scripts.test: npm run test:node && npm run test:python
